About Aditi

I've walked the path.
All of it.

I was always the fat kid. Carried that weight — physically and emotionally — for most of my life. Then came PCOS, thyroid, autoimmune issues, insulin resistance. And right in the middle of all of it: trauma, loss, divorce, raising a young child alone, a job I was holding together with everything I had, and COVID on top of it all.

I lost 30kg postpartum. Not through a miracle plan. Through finally understanding my own body, my own brain, and the psychology behind why I kept self-sabotaging. I built systems that worked for me — and then I went and got certified to teach them.

I'm an INFS Certified Nutrition & Fitness Coach. I use the psychology and physiology behind your habits and behaviours — and I work to break them. Sometimes with love. Sometimes with kindness. Sometimes with a push. Whatever you need.

✦ INFS Certified Nutrition & Fitness Coach

Before you talk yourself out of it

I've heard every reason not to start.

Here's the truth behind each one.

"I won't eat soup and salad every day."
Good. Because I'm not going to ask you to. Real food. Real meals. That's the whole point.
"I can't cook separately for myself."
You won't have to. We work with what's already on your table.
"I can't go to the gym."
You don't have to. Movement looks different for everyone. We'll find yours.
"I travel a lot. I can't follow a plan."
That's exactly why we'll build one that travels with you.
"I'm a vegetarian."
So are a lot of my clients. Not a problem. Not even close.
"I won't have protein powder."
Fine. There's food for that too.
"I just can't control myself around food."
That's not a willpower problem. That's a habit and emotion problem. And that's exactly what we work on.
"I'm not giving up my favourite foods."
I'd never ask you to. Food is joy. We're just changing the relationship.
"I'll fall off the plan — during vacations, exams, life."
Everyone does. That's not failure — that's life. We plan for the falls. Getting back up, every single time. That's the actual work.
Programs

Which one is for you?

Every program is built around your specific body, health history, and life. No templates. No guesswork.

🔥
Fat Loss
For men, women & NRIs

Not another diet. A way of living you can actually keep. Built around your real life — not some ideal version of it. Whether you're in India or abroad, we start from where you actually are.

⚖️
Weight Gain
Healthy, sustainable, nourishing

For those who've been told to "just eat more" — and it hasn't worked. Building lean mass and sustainable weight through food that works for your body's specific needs.

🌿
Hormone Reset
PCOS · Thyroid · Insulin resistance

When your body feels like it's working against you. Covering PCOS, thyroid, and insulin resistance — because these rarely come alone, and they all need to be looked at together.

🌱
Gut Restore
Digestion · Bloating · Inflammation

Your gut is the foundation of everything — energy, immunity, mood, hormones. If your digestion is struggling, everything else does too. Let's fix it from the inside.

🌸
PCOS Management
Hormones · Cycles · Symptoms

For women tired of being told to "just lose weight." PCOS is complex. Your plan should be too — addressing hormones, food, movement, and mindset as one complete picture.

🦋
Menopause Wellness
Perimenopause · Menopause · Ageing well

This is not "just getting older." The changes your body is going through are real — and manageable. Gentle, practical support for women navigating this chapter with strength.

How it works

Not what you've tried before.

I don't hand you a generic plan and disappear.

01

I look at the why behind your habits, not just the what. Your food history, your stress, your life — all of it matters.

02

I build a plan around your real life — not some ideal version of it. Your kitchen. Your schedule. Your food preferences.

03

I hold space for your setbacks, because setbacks are part of it. We don't restart from zero. We just keep going.

04

I work with pressure, kindness, or love — whatever you need that day. You'll know which one you're getting.
